originalTitle: I Went to WAR on a Hardcore Minecraft SMP
content: unstable smp civil war I Went to WAR on a Hardcore Minecraft SMP Unstable SMP: ➜ ⁨ @ParrotX2 ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @Spokeishere ➜ ⁨ @wemmbumc minor spoilers below featuring:@yungymc @JadenMAN @FlameFragsMC @Lomedy @Spongs @saparata @ParrotX2 @LettuceK @TheobaldTheBird @fymada cindercrest blimp design: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IZTobBVAJ6U music from: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) https://www.youtube.com/user/andreaszoellermusic https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/) Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Fleshless - Fleischlos (piano version) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=badF7knDy8A by Sebastian Löbbers & Nicolas Lietzau, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prophet (dialogue) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nreMC82GPo4 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Run of Things - Lauf der Dinge https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V5mExzEKWs8 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ we wa we wa
chineseTitle: | 我 | 在 | 《 | 我 | 的 | 世 | 界 | 》 | 硬 | 核 | | S | M | P | | 上 | 参 | 战 |
chineseContent: 不稳定的 smp 内战 我在《我的世界》硬核 SMP 上爆发了不稳定的 SMP： ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @Spokeishere ➜ @wemmbumc 以下有小剧透：@yungymc @JadenMAN @FlameFragsMC @Lomedy @Spongs @saparata @ParrotX2 @LettuceK @TheobaldTheBird @fymada cindercrest 飞艇设计：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IZTobBVAJ6U 音乐来自：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg （我使用的大量音乐是 AZALI 创作的，所以请检查他！） https://www.youtube.com/user/andreaszoellermusic https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music 这是在 Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP 中录制的 Minecraft 视频，用于讲故事；我上传的任何更多上演的视频都会在说明中包含免责声明，说明它们也是上演的。此外，Unstable SMP 视频中讨论的许多游戏机制/故障/红石对于 Unstable SMP/Unstable Universe 来说是独特的，并且两者都不会以相同的方式工作/在 vanilla Minecraft 中不存在。音乐还来自：《我的世界》官方原声带、《上古卷轴》官方原声带、官方 enderal 原声带、epidemicsound (https://www.epidemicsound.com)、storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com)、artlist (https://artlist.io)、soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com)、fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music) 和envato (https://elements.envato.com/) Enderal 原声带 (HQ)：Fleshless - Fleischlos (钢琴版) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=badF7knDy8A，由 Sebastian Löbbers 和 Nicolas Lietzau 创作，经 CC BY 4.0 授权 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal 原声带 (HQ)： 《先知》（对话） https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nreMC82GPo4，作者：Marvin Kopp，根据 CC BY 4.0 授权 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal Soundtrack - Extended
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
